description: User-Triggered Auto-Learning Contract — defines ownership, activation, limits, and safety boundaries for autonomous learning in ILMA

session_states.ARMED: Trigger parsed, awaiting explicit start confirmation
session_states.RUNNING: Auto-learning actively executing within scope and duration
session_states.PAUSED: Session paused by owner command, can be resumed or stopped
session_states.COMPLETED: Session finished normally (duration expired or goals met)
session_states.STOPPED: Session terminated by owner command or safety gate
session_states.BLOCKED: Session blocked by forbidden action or unsafe request
session_states.FAILED_SAFE: Session failed due to unrecoverable error, safely terminated
